{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Delia
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Delia]] is a doll that [[Simon]] hardly ever spoke with.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
